.file-embed.background: rgb(250, 238, 225) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(238, 231, 221) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(247, 243, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(247, 243, 238) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(247, 243, 238), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(247, 243, 238) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(247, 243, 238) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(247, 243, 238), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(247, 243, 238) 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(247, 243, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(247, 243, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(124, 155, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(8, 109, 221, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(241, 230, 214, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(247, 243, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(241, 230, 214, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(238, 231, 221) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(238, 231, 221) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(238, 231, 221) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(238, 231, 221) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(241, 230, 214) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(250, 238, 225) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
